description: A graphic on a black background showing a man with short gray hair in a green Border Patrol uniform and tactical gear, holding a rifle across his chest. A name tape reads 'G. BOVINO' and a patch reads 'BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT' beside a gold badge. Gold text below reads 'BLD PATROL HQ' and 'Trained to protect your ass, not kiss it.'
notable_text: G. BOVINO; BORDER PATROL FEDERAL AGENT; Trained to protect your ass, not kiss it.
